source: CCE AOM default alarm rule templates with environment-specific IDs replaced by runtime values.

monitor_objects.event_name: 集群状态不可用##Cluster status is Unavailable

trigger_conditions.event_name: 集群状态不可用##Cluster status is Unavailable

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查无状态负载的副本数是否匹配。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查无状态负载的副本数是否匹配。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到无状态负载的副本数不匹配。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The number of Deployment replicas does not match the expected value.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/无状态负载：${deployment} 未达到预期副本数（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Replicas of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/Deployment ${deployment} do not reach the desired number (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点上持久卷使用率是否过高。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点上持久卷使用率是否过高。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点上持久卷使用率过高。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node's PV usage is too high.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${node}/命名空间：${namespace}/持久卷声明：${persistentvolumeclaim}使用率过高，当前可用空间剩余 ${value}%（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${node}/namespace ${namespace}/PVC ${persistentvolumeclaim} is too high. Current available space: ${value}% (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查持久卷声明状态是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查持久卷声明状态是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到持久卷声明状态异常。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The PVC is abnormal.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/持久卷声明：${persistentvolumeclaim} 处于 ${phase} 状态（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/PVC ${persistentvolumeclaim} has been in the ${phase} status (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查持久卷状态是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查持久卷状态是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到持久卷状态异常。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The PV is abnormal.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/持久卷：${persistentvolume} 处于 ${phase} 状态（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Cluster ${cluster_name}/PV ${persistentvolume} has been in the ${phase} status (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点状态是否在正常和异常之间抖动。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点状态是否在正常和异常之间抖动。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 节点状态在15分钟内抖动超过了2次，详情原因请通过kubernetes指定节点事件查看。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node status alternates more than twice within 15 minutes. For details, see the corresponding Kubernetes node event.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${node}的状态在15分钟变化了${value}次（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The status of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${node} changes ${value} times within 15 minutes (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查pod状态是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查pod状态是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到pod状态异常。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The pod is abnormal.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod} 处于${phase}状态（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod} has been in the ${phase} status (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查pod是否频繁重启。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查pod是否频繁重启。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到pod频繁重启。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The pod restarts frequently.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod} 五分钟内重启超过3次（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod} restarts for more than three times within 5 minutes (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查ResolvConf配置文件是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查ResolvConf配置文件是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点ResolvConf配置文件丢失或内容异常，可能影响域名解析功能。请登录节点查看/etc/resolv.conf文件情况。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node's ResolvConf configuration file is lost or has abnormal content, which may affect domain name resolution. Log in to the node to check the /etc/resolv.conf file.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} ResolvConf配置文件异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The ResolvConf configuration file of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查有状态负载的副本数是否匹配。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查有状态负载的副本数是否匹配。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到有状态负载的副本数不匹配。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The number of StatefulSet replicas does not match the expected value.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/有状态负载：${statefulset} 未达到预期副本数（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Replicas of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/StatefulSet ${statefulset} do not reach the desired number (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查容器CPU使用率是否大于80%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_容器CPU使用率大于百分之八十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 容器CPU使用率大于百分之八十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查容器CPU使用率是否大于80%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 容器CPU使用率大于百分之八十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到容器CPU使用率大于80%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The container CPU usage is greater than 80%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/容器：${container} cpu使用率超过80%, 当前值${value}%（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The CPU usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod}/container ${container} exceeds 80%. Current usage: ${value}% (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查容器内存WorkingSet使用率是否大于80%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_容器内存使用率大于百分之八十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 容器内存使用率大于百分之八十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查容器内存WorkingSet使用率是否大于80%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 容器内存使用率大于百分之八十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到容器内存WorkingSet使用率大于80%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The container memory WorkingSet usage is greater than 80%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/容器：${container} 内存WorkingSet使用率超过80%, 当前值${value}%（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The memory usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod}/container ${container} exceeds 80%. Current usage: ${value}% (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).
trigger_conditions.promql: (sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",image!="", container!="POD"}) BY (cluster_name, node,container, pod , namespace, cluster) / sum(container_spec_memory_limit_bytes{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__"} > 0) BY (cluster_name, node, container, pod , namespace, cluster) * 100) > 80

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查容器状态是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查容器状态是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 容器处于Waiting状态超过1小时。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The container has been in the Waiting status for more than 1 hour.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/容器：${container} 处于Waiting状态（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace: ${namespace}/pod ${pod}/container ${container} has been in the Waiting status (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).
trigger_conditions.promql: sum by (namespace, pod, container, cluster_name, cluster) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__"}) > 0

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点CNI（容器网络）组件是否正常运行。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点CNI（容器网络）组件是否正常运行。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点CNI（容器网络）组件异常，将影响新建Pod。通常原因为容器网络组件启动失败，请登录节点检查容器网络组件的启动情况。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node's CNI component is abnormal, affecting new pods. The possible cause is that the CNI component fails to start. Log in to the node to check the CNI startup.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} 容器网络组件异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The CNI component of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点CPU使用率是否大于80%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_节点CPU使用率超过百分之八十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 节点CPU使用率超过百分之八十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点CPU使用率是否大于80%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 节点CPU使用率超过百分之八十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点CPU使用率大于80%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node CPU usage is greater than 80%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${node} CPU使用率超过80%，当前 CPU使用率为 ${value}%（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The CPU usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${node} exceeds 80%. Current CPU usage: ${value}% (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查关键组件CRI（容器运行时组件）Docker或Containerd的运行状态。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查关键组件CRI（容器运行时组件）Docker或Containerd的运行状态。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到CRI组件（容器运行时组件，Docker或Containerd）异常，将影响新建Pod。通常原因为容器组件停止运行，请登陆节点检查容器运行时组件的启动情况。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The CRI component (Docker or containerd) is abnormal, affecting new pods. The possible cause is that the CRI component stops running. Log in to the node to check the CRI startup.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} CRI组件异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The CRI component of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查Containerd是否频繁重启。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查Containerd是否频繁重启。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到Containerd频繁重启。通常由Containerd配置异常导致，请登录节点排查Containerd的启动日志。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: containerd restarts frequently. This is usually caused by abnormal containerd configurations. Log in to the node to check the containerd startup logs.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} Containerd频繁重启，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: containerd of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} restarts frequently. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查Docker是否频繁重启。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查Docker是否频繁重启。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到Docker频繁重启。通常由Docker配置异常导致，请登录节点排查Docker的启动日志。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: Docker restarts frequently. This is usually caused by abnormal Docker configurations. Log in to the node to check the Docker startup logs.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} Docker频繁重启，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Docker of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} restarts frequently. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查Kube-proxy是否正常运行。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查Kube-proxy是否正常运行。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到Kube-proxy运行异常。通常由Kube-proxy配置异常导致，请登录节点排查Kube-proxy启动日志。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: Kube-proxy is not running properly. This is usually caused by abnormal Kube-proxy configurations. Log in to the node to check the Kube-proxy startup logs.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} Kube-proxy故障，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: kube-proxy of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been faulty. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查Kubelet状态是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查Kubelet状态是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点Kubelet运行异常。通常由Kubelet配置异常导致，请登录节点排查Kubelet启动日志。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node's kubelet is not running properly. This is usually caused by abnormal kubelet configurations. Log in to the node to check the kubelet startup logs.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} Kubelet异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: kubelet of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查Kubelet是否频繁重启。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查Kubelet是否频繁重启。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到Kubelet频繁重启。通常由Kubelet配置异常导致，请登录节点排查Kubelet启动日志。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: kubelet restarts frequently. This is usually caused by abnormal kubelet configurations. Log in to the node to check the kubelet startup logs.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} Kubelet频繁重启，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: kubelet of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} restarts frequently. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查关键系统服务节点时钟同步服务ntpd或chronyd是否正常运行。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查关键系统服务节点时钟同步服务ntpd或chronyd是否正常运行。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到关键系统服务节点时钟同步服务ntpd或chronyd运行异常。可能影响依赖时钟同步的应用。请登录节点排查时间同步服务运行情况。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node clock synchronization service ntpd or chronyd is not running properly. Applications that depend on clock synchronization may be affected. Log in to the node to check the running status of time synchronization.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} NTP服务故障，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The NTP service of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been faulty. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点临时卷存储池是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点临时卷存储池是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点上EmptyDirVolume临时卷存储池部分缺失，影响新建及存量依赖临时卷存储池的Pod。目前调度器可自动识别此异常状态并避免依赖存储池的Pod调度到该节点上。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: Part of the EmptyDirVolume storage pool on the node is missing, affecting new and existing pods that depend on the storage pool. The scheduler can identify this exception and prevent pods that depend on the storage pool from being scheduled to the node.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} emptydir存储池异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The emptyDir storage pool of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点可用内存是否不足10%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_节点内存可用率不足百分之十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 节点内存可用率不足百分之十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点可用内存是否不足10%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 节点内存可用率不足百分之十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点可用内存不足10%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The available node memory is less than 10%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${node} 内存可用率不足10%，当前内存可用率为 ${value}%（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The available memory in cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${node} is less than 10%. Current available memory: ${value}% (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点整体内存是否充足。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点整体内存是否充足。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点整体内存不足。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The overall node memory is insufficient.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}内存资源不足，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Memory resources of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} have been insufficient. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点是否存在主机计划事件。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点是否存在主机计划事件。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点存在计划事件，将自动进行热迁移、冷迁移或关机等操作。计划事件通常由硬件故障触发，是IaaS层的一种自动故障修复手段。建议驱逐并隔离该节点上的业务Pod至其他正常节点，避免运行中业务受影响。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: A scheduled event is detected on the node, triggering live migration, cold migration, or shutdown. A scheduled event is usually triggered by a hardware fault and used by the IaaS layer to rectify faults automatically. You are advised to evict and isolate the service pods to other normal nodes to prevent services from being affected.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} 存在计划事件，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。计划事件通常由硬件故障触发，是IaaS层的一种自动故障修复手段。检测到节点存在计划事件，将自动进行热迁移、冷迁移或关机等操作。建议驱逐并隔离该节点上的业务Pod至其他正常节点，避免运行中业务受影响。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: A scheduled event has existed in cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance}. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}). A scheduled event is usually triggered by a hardware fault and used by the IaaS layer to rectify faults automatically. A scheduled event is detected on the node, triggering live migration, cold migration, or shutdown. You are advised to evict and isolate the service pods to other normal nodes to prevent services from being affected.

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点上持久卷存储池是否异常。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_节点持久卷存储池异常___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 节点持久卷存储池异常

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点上持久卷存储池是否异常。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 节点持久卷存储池异常

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点上LocalPvVolume持久卷存储池是否部分缺失，调度器可自动识别此异常状态并避免依赖存储池的Pod调度到该节点上。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: Check whether the LocalPvVolume storage pool on the node is partially missing. The scheduler can identify this exception and prevent pods that depend on the storage pool from being scheduled to the node.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}持久卷存储池异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The PV storage pool of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点上的挂载点是否异常。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点上的挂载点是否异常。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点挂载点异常，通常原因为节点挂载了网络文件系统且该系统的服务端异常。将影响业务访问网络存储，影响kubelet重启。请登录节点排查。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node's mount point is abnormal. The possible cause is that a network file system has been mounted to the node and the server of the system is abnormal. Services cannot access the network storage, affecting the kubelet restart. Log in to the node to locate the fault.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}挂载点异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The mount point of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查系统关键资源FD文件句柄数是否充足。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查系统关键资源FD文件句柄数是否充足。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到文件句柄数资源不足，通常原因为系统PID配置过低，或负载存在进程泄露。请登录排查PID的使用率。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The file handles are insufficient. The possible cause is that the system PID is too low or process leakage occurs. Log in to the node to check the PID usage.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} 文件句柄数不足，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: File handles of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} have been insufficient. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点文件描述符利用率是否超过90%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_节点文件描述符利用率超过百分之九十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 节点文件描述符利用率超过百分之九十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点文件描述符利用率是否超过90%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 节点文件描述符利用率超过百分之九十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检查节点文件描述符利用率是否超过90%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node filefd allocated usage is greater than 90%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${node} 文件描述符利用率超过90%，当前文件描述符利用率为 ${value}%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The filefd allocated usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${node} exceeds 90%. Current usage: ${value}%.

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点磁盘是否存在卡IO故障。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点磁盘是否存在卡IO故障。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点磁盘存在卡IO故障，即IO读写无响应。请登陆节点查看磁盘IO情况。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: I/O suspension occurs on the node disk, that is, the I/O read and write operations are not responded. Log in to the node to check the disk I/O status.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}磁盘卡IO，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The disk I/O of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been suspended. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点磁盘是否只读。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点磁盘是否只读。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到CCE关键磁盘（系统盘、Kubelet盘和容器运行时盘）无法正常写，将导致Pod新建。该故障通常由磁盘异常导致。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: Data cannot be written to key CCE disks (system disks, kubelet disks, and container runtime disks), affecting new pods. This fault is usually caused by disk exceptions.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}磁盘只读，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The disk of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been read-only. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点可用磁盘是否不足10%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_节点磁盘可用率不足百分之十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 节点磁盘可用率不足百分之十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点可用磁盘是否不足10%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 节点磁盘可用率不足百分之十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点可用磁盘不足10%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The available node disk space is less than 10%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${node}/磁盘 ${device} 可用率不足10%，当前磁盘可用率为 ${value}%（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The available disk space in cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${node}/disk ${device} is less than 10%. Current available space: ${value}% (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点系统盘、CCE数据盘（包含docker逻辑盘与kubelet逻辑盘）的磁盘使用情况。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点系统盘、CCE数据盘（包含docker逻辑盘与kubelet逻辑盘）的磁盘使用情况。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到磁盘占用率过高或不可读写。请登录节点检查节点系统盘、CCE数据盘（包含docker逻辑盘与kubelet逻辑盘）的使用情况。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The disk usage is too high or the disk cannot be read or written. Log in to the node to check the usage of system disks and CCE data disks (including Docker and kubelet logical disks).
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}磁盘异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The disk of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been abnormal. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检测节点磁盘是否存在慢IO故障。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检测节点磁盘是否存在慢IO故障。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点磁盘存在慢IO故障，即IO响应缓慢。请登陆节点查看磁盘IO情况。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: Slow I/O is detected on the node disk, that is, the I/O response is slow. Log in to the node to check the disk I/O status.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}磁盘慢IO，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The disk I/O of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been slow. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点是否存在D进程。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点是否存在D进程。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点存在D状态进程，影响节点稳定性。请登录节点排查并消除D进程的产生源。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node has a D state process, affecting node stability. Log in to the node to locate and eliminate the source of the D state process.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} 进程D异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: A D state process has existed in cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance}. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点是否存在Z进程。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点是否存在Z进程。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到节点存在Z状态进程，影响节点稳定性。请登录节点排查并消除Z进程的产生源。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node has a Z state process, affecting node stability. Log in to the node to locate and eliminate the source of the Z state process.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} 进程Z异常，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: A Z state process has existed in cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance}. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查系统关键资源PID进程资源是否充足。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查系统关键资源PID进程资源是否充足。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到PID资源不足，将影响系统进程或工作负载正常运行，通常原因为系统参数配置过低，或负载存在进程泄露。请登录节点排查PID的使用率。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: PID resources are insufficient, affecting system processes or workloads. The possible cause is that the system parameter value is too small or process leakage occurs. Log in to the node to check the PID usage.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance} 进程资源不足，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: Process resources of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} have been insufficient. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点连接跟踪表条目利用率是否超过90%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_节点连接跟踪表条目利用率超过百分之九十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 节点连接跟踪表条目利用率超过百分之九十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点连接跟踪表条目利用率是否超过90%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 节点连接跟踪表条目利用率超过百分之九十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检查节点连接跟踪表条目利用率是否超过90%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The node connTrack entries usage is greater than 90%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${node} 连接跟踪表条目利用率超过90%，当前连接跟踪表条目利用率为 ${value}%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The connTrack entries usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${node} exceeds 90%. Current usage: ${value}%.

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查节点链接跟踪表是否充足。

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查节点链接跟踪表是否充足。

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检测到链接跟踪表即将耗尽，将影响节点网络连接建立。通常原因为该节点已建立并持续处理了大量的长连接请求。请登陆节点检查连接情况并适当扩容节点。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The conntrack table is about to be used up, affecting the network connection establishment of the node. The possible cause is that the node has established and continuously processed a large number of persistent connection requests. Log in to the node to check the connection and scale out the node.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/节点：${instance}链接跟踪表不足，异常原因：${reason}（触发条件-持续时间：${duration_zh}）。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The conntrack table space of cluster ${cluster_name}/node ${instance} has been insufficient. Cause: ${reason} (trigger condition duration: ${duration_en}).

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查集群Coredns内存使用率大于80%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_集群Coredns内存使用率大于百分之八十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 集群Coredns内存使用率大于百分之八十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查集群Coredns内存使用率大于80%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 集群Coredns内存使用率大于百分之八十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检查集群Coredns内存使用率是否大于80%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The cluster coredns memory usage is greater than 80%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/Coredns 内存使用率超过80%, 当前值${value}%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The coredns memory usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod} exceeds 80%. Current usage: ${value}%.
trigger_conditions.promql: (sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",image!="", container!="POD", namespace="kube-system", container="coredns"}) BY (cluster_name, node,container, pod , namespace, cluster) / sum(container_spec_memory_limit_bytes{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",namespace="kube-system", container="coredns"} > 0) BY (cluster_name, node, container, pod , namespace, cluster) * 100) > 80

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查集群CorednsCPU使用率大于60%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_集群Coredns插件的CPU使用率大于百分之六十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 集群Coredns插件的CPU使用率大于百分之六十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查集群CorednsCPU使用率大于60%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 集群Coredns插件的CPU使用率大于百分之六十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检查集群CorednsCPU使用率是否大于60%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The cluster coredns cpu usage is greater than 60%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/Coredns cpu使用率超过60%, 当前值${value}%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The coredns cpu usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod} exceeds 60%. Current usage: ${value}%.
trigger_conditions.promql: 100 * (sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",image!="", container!="POD", namespace="kube-system", container="coredns"}[1m])) by (cluster_name,pod,node,namespace,container, cluster) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",resource="cpu", namespace="kube-system", container="coredns"}) by (cluster_name,pod,node,namespace,container, cluster)) > 60

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查集群Coredns P95时延是否超过1s。
templates.alias: 集群Coredns插件的P95时延超过1秒

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查集群Coredns P95时延是否超过1s。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 集群Coredns插件的P95时延超过1秒

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检查集群Coredns P95时延是否超过1s。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The cluster coredns P95 latency is greater than 1 second.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/Coredns P95时延超过1秒，命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/当前值${value}%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The coredns P95 latency of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod} exceeds 1 second. Current usage: ${value}%.
trigger_conditions.promql: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",job="coredns"}[5m])) by (le, cluster, cluster_name, pod, instance, namespace)) > 1

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查集群Nginx-ingress CPU使用率是否大于70%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_集群Nginx-ingress插件的CPU使用率大于百分之七十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 集群Nginx-ingress插件的CPU使用率大于百分之七十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查集群Nginx-ingress CPU使用率是否大于70%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 集群Nginx-ingress插件的CPU使用率大于百分之七十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检查集群Nginx-ingress CPU使用率是否大于70%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The cluster Nginx-ingress cpu usage is greater than 70%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/Nginx-Ingress cpu使用率超过70%, 当前值${value}%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The Nginx-ingress cpu usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod}/Nginx-Ingress exceeds 70%. Current usage: ${value}%.
trigger_conditions.promql: 100 * (sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",image!="", container!="POD", namespace="kube-system", container="nginx-ingress-controller"}[1m])) by (cluster_name,pod,node,namespace,container, cluster) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",resource="cpu", namespace="kube-system", container="nginx-ingress-controller"}) by (cluster_name,pod,node,namespace,container, cluster)) > 70

templates.alarm_rule_description: 检查集群Nginx-ingress 内存使用率是否大于70%。
templates.alarm_rule_name: CCE_集群Nginx-ingress插件的内存使用率大于百分之七十___CCE_CLUSTER_ID__
templates.alias: 集群Nginx-ingress插件的内存使用率大于百分之七十

bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_desc: 检查集群Nginx-ingress 内存使用率是否大于70%。
bind_alarm_rule_template_info.alarm_rule_template_rule_name: 集群Nginx-ingress插件的内存使用率大于百分之七十

trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary: 检查集群Nginx-ingress 内存使用率是否大于70%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_summary_en: The cluster Nginx-ingress memory usage is greater than 70%.
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template: 集群：${cluster_name}/命名空间：${namespace}/Pod：${pod}/Nginx-Ingress 内存使用率超过70%, 当前值${value}%。
trigger_conditions.alarm_message_template_en: The Nginx-ingress memory usage of cluster ${cluster_name}/namespace ${namespace}/pod ${pod}/Nginx-Ingress exceeds 70%. Current usage: ${value}%.
trigger_conditions.promql: (sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",image!="", container!="POD", namespace="kube-system", container="nginx-ingress-controller"}) BY (cluster_name, node,container, pod , namespace, cluster) / sum(container_spec_memory_limit_bytes{cluster="__CCE_CLUSTER_ID__",namespace="kube-system", container="nginx-ingress-controller"} > 0) BY (cluster_name, node, container, pod , namespace, cluster) * 100) > 70
